violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate - Has not Provided certificate number, name of person and date of class
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. - Cook did not wash hands prior to gloving.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Soda pop bibs found on floor behind bar.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth found behind bar.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable for operations of ready-to-eat foods. - Single use cups found in crotons, bacon, tomatoes. - Bowl found in salad mix for use of dispensing.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -All items in reach-in found undated.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - ice machine found dirty.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Staff found using bleach in wash water then using Quat in 3rd sink.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - Handwash station in kitchen had roaster oven in the sink making it unable to use.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. - Food items, tomatoes, pickles, sauces, cheeses found on counter without a way to kept cold during service. All items moved to reach-in.
